mapper.select: select c.*, e.name as master_name, (case when c.begin_date > curdate() then '未开班' when c.end_date < curdate() then '已结课' else '已开班' end) as status from clazz c left join emp e on c.master_id = e.id

select c.*, e.name as master_name, (case when c.begin_date > curdate() then '未开班' when c.end_date < curdate() then '已结课' else '已开班' end) as status from clazz c left join emp e on c.master_id = e.id
c.name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
and c.begin_date between #{begin} and #{end}
order by c.begin_date desc
mapper.insert: insert into clazz(name, room, begin_date, end_date, master_id, subject, create_time, update_time) values(#{name}, #{room}, #{beginDate}, #{endDate}, #{masterId}, #{subject}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: select c.*, e.name as master_name, (case when c.begin_date > curdate() then '未开班' when c.end_date < curdate() then '已结课' else '在读' end) as status from clazz c left join emp e on c.master_id = e.id where c.id = #{id}
